UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ASIF SIDDIQUE'S MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH DETERMINATION AND SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBIT D IS ATTACHED TO DAVID BACHO'S DECLARATION SUBMITTED TO THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES THAT JAVIER CLAUDIO "ATTORNEY" WAS SERVED BY LEAVING A COPY OF THE MOTION "WITH A RECEPTIONIST OR AN INDIVIDUAL IN CHARGE OF THE OFFICE." NO EVIDENCE IS PROVIDED THAT JAVIER CLAUDIO, ALLEGED TO BE A CONTRACTOR IN THE COMPLAINT, IS AN ATTORNEY OR THAT 172 MELISSA CIR. DALY CITY, CA IS AN OFFICE WITH A RECEPTIONIST. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Francisco Gutierrez, Esq.(415-512-9865), for Dennis McElligott, Plaintiff and moving party.
Philip R. Soderquist, Esq. (415-981-5411), for Asif Siddique, Defendant and opposing party.

Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. Plaintiff argues briefly and indicates that Plaintiff is not filing a motion for trial continuance.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DENNIS MCELLIGOTT's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is DENIED. Case is set for trial on June 15, 2015. If the motion is granted Plaintiff would need to seek continuance. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on MON-AUG-25-2014:
Francisco A. Guierrez, Esq. of M C Hall & Associates, P.C. [415.512.9865] appearing for Plaintiff DENNIS MCELLIGOTT;
David R. Bacho, Esq. of Bledso, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP [415.981.5411] appearing for Defendant ASIF SIDDIQUE.

RULING - ARGUED: The Court's tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ASIF SIDDIQUE'S Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement is DENIED without prejudice. No Exhibit D is attached to David Bacho's Declaration submitted to the Court. Proof of Service indicates that Javier Claudio "attorney" was served by leaving a copy of the motion "with a receptionist or an individual in charge of the office." No evidence is provided that Javier Claudio, alleged to be a contractor in the complaint, is an attorney or that 172 Melissa Cir. Daly City, CA is an office with a receptionist. Prevailing party to prepare a form order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)
